healthy.title: Great Financial Health
healthy.description: You're saving well! Here are ways to optimize further.

moderate.title: Room for Improvement
moderate.description: Your spending is manageable, but you could save more.

at_risk.title: Action Needed
at_risk.description: Your expenses are close to or exceeding your income.

rules.title: Reduce Dining Expenses
rules.description: Dining makes up {ratio}% of your spending. Try meal prepping to cut costs by 30-50%.

rules.title: Optimize Entertainment Budget
rules.description: Entertainment is {ratio}% of spending. Consider free alternatives or shared subscriptions.

rules.title: Curb Shopping Spending
rules.description: Shopping is {ratio}% of your expenses. Try a 24-hour rule before non-essential purchases.

rules.title: Lower Transport Costs
rules.description: Transport is {ratio}% of spending. Consider carpooling, public transit, or biking.

rules.title: Optimize Grocery Budget
rules.description: Groceries are {ratio}% of spending. Plan meals, buy in bulk, and use coupons.

rules.title: Start an Emergency Fund
rules.description: You're saving less than 5%. Aim to save at least 10% of income as a safety net.

rules.title: Spending Increased Significantly
rules.description: Your spending increased {increase}% from last month. Review recent purchases for non-essentials.

rules.title: Reduce Utility Bills
rules.description: Utilities are {ratio}% of spending. Check for better plans, reduce usage, or switch providers.
